policies.title: Severe damage → full refund (severity ≥ 7)
policies.rationale: Severely damaged goods need not be returned — return shipping often costs more than the refund.

policies.title: Moderate damage → partial refund (severity 4-6)
policies.rationale: Usable but flawed. 50% restores fairness without forcing a return.

policies.title: Cosmetic only → store credit (severity 1-3)
policies.rationale: Outer-box / packaging scuffs. Store credit retains the customer at lowest cost.

policies.title: Fragile category broken → replacement
policies.rationale: Customers buying breakables expect a working item, not a refund.

policies.title: Electronics water damage → escalate to human
policies.rationale: Liquid damage requires warranty interpretation; never auto-decide.

policies.title: Missing parts → replacement of part
policies.rationale: Ship the missing part. Refunding the whole order is bad UX.

policies.title: Manufacturing defect within warranty → full refund + return
policies.rationale: Defects need QA review; the item must come back for inspection.

policies.title: Apparel · tear / hole → full refund, no return
policies.rationale: Used apparel can't be resold. Return shipping is wasted handling.

policies.title: Apparel · stain / dye transfer → 70% partial refund
policies.rationale: Often salvageable with cleaning. 70% covers professional cleaning + dissatisfaction.

policies.title: Apparel · size mismatch (not damage) → return + exchange
policies.rationale: Fit issues need exchange, not refund. Reduces refund rate.

policies.title: Electronics · screen damage > $200 → escalate
policies.rationale: High-value electronics screens involve warranty + insurance interplay.

policies.title: Electronics · accessory damaged (cable/case) → replacement
policies.rationale: Low-cost accessory — replacement is cheaper than dispute time.

policies.title: Electronics · DOA (dead on arrival) → full refund + free return label
policies.rationale: DOA is a manufacturing issue — full refund + we pay return shipping.

policies.title: Perishables (food / cosmetics / supplements) → instant full refund
policies.rationale: Perishables can never be returned. Auto-refund is industry standard.

policies.title: Perishables · expiry-close at delivery → 30% + apology
policies.rationale: Stock rotation issue. 30% acknowledges the inconvenience without giving away margin.

policies.title: Perishables · spillage in transit → full refund, no return
policies.rationale: Leaked product is unsellable and unsafe to handle. Refund and discard.

policies.title: Luxury (> $500) · ANY damage → escalate to human
policies.rationale: Luxury brand voice + premium customer expectation requires a human touch.

policies.title: Luxury packaging damage (item OK) → store credit 10% of order
policies.rationale: Luxury customers buy the unboxing experience. Credit them, keep them.

policies.title: Luxury · authentication concern → escalate immediately
policies.rationale: Authentication disputes are legal/brand risk — human only.

policies.title: Luxury · customer is repeat VIP → upgrade to replacement + apology gift
policies.rationale: VIP retention NPV > replacement cost.

policies.title: Cross-border · damaged in customs → full refund, no return
policies.rationale: Cross-border returns cost more than the refund; customs adds 2-4 weeks.

policies.title: Cross-border · duty/tax overcharge claim → refund difference
policies.rationale: Duty disputes need human verification of receipts.

policies.title: Peak-season delay (BFCM / 11.11 / 618) → store credit
policies.rationale: Bulk-season carrier delays are systemic. $15 credit reduces churn.

policies.title: Emotion ≥ 8 → +20% offer uplift
policies.rationale: High emotion = high churn risk = high CSAT recovery cost. 20% uplift wins back loyalty cheaper than re-acquisition.

policies.title: Legal / media / regulator threat → force escalate
policies.rationale: Brand & legal risk — humans handle reputational exposure.

policies.title: No image + claim ≥ $50 → escalate
policies.rationale: Photo evidence is the standard for auto-pay above $50. Below, friction > fraud risk.
